mapper.select: /* FAQ 카테고리 목록 조회 */ select faq_cate_idx, faq_cate_name from tb_faq_category order by faq_cate_step
mapper.update: /* FAQ 수정 */ update tb_sms_user set faq_cate_idx = #{faqCateIdx}, question = #{question}, answer = #{answer}, mod_uid = #{modUid }, mod_date = now() where 1=1 and faq_idx = #{faqIdx }
/* FAQ 삭제 */ update tb_faq set del_yn = 'Y', mod_uid = #{modUid }, mod_date = now() where 1=1 and faq_idx = #{faqIdx }
